name: Legendary Guardian cookies
description:
Open rp scenario bot with the elemental guardian cookies of Earthbread

This bot includes: Wind archer cookie, Fire Spirit cookie, Moonlight cookie, Sea Fairy cookie, Frost Queen cookie, and Stormbringer cookie
